_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: IT service management involves identifying, prioritising and implementing IT services, ensuring the organisation gets maximum value for money.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-001 (DG, cosine: 0.518), AI-K-015 (AI, cosine: 0.489).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.532). Shared vocabulary: [management, service, services]. DDaT-only terms [ensuring, gets, identifying, implementing, involves, maximum] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.875, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DDaT element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "IT service management involves identifying, prioritising and implementing IT ser" and "Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.668 > STS 0.532 (gap +0.137). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management, service, services] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.6%. Shared tokens: [management, service, services]. DDaT-only: [ensuring, gets, identifying, implementing, involves, maximum]. WIDAI-only: [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement].

signals.detail: STS 0.532 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.137 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
